project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) with React frontend and Node.js/Express backend
build_system: Vite for frontend, tsc for backend
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files found)
verification_instructions: Run TypeScript type-check on frontend to verify no compilation errors
environment_constraints: Internet access available for npm packages. No database running so cannot test full app end-to-end, but can verify TypeScript compiles.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: All frontend code uses inline styles (no CSS-in-JS library). Components use React Query hooks from src/hooks/index.ts. Auth via Zustand store. Pages in src/pages/, dashboards in src/pages/dashboards/. CSS variables defined in src/index.css. The app uses custom CSS with Inter font, responsive breakpoints at 640px and 1024px.
directory_structure: frontend/src/pages/ contains all page components. frontend/src/pages/dashboards/ has role-specific dashboards. frontend/src/hooks/index.ts has all React Query hooks. frontend/src/services/api.ts has Axios API client. frontend/src/store/auth.store.ts has Zustand auth store. frontend/src/index.css has all global styles.
